Study the given diagram carefully and answer the question. The numbers in different sections indicate the number of persons. (Medal winners section shows 12; Medal winners ∩ Gymnasts = 8; Medal winners ∩ Girls = 16; Medal winners ∩ Gymnasts ∩ Girls = 11; Gymnasts only = 23; Gymnasts ∩ Girls = 14; Girls only = 25.)
Which of the following statements is correct on the basis of the above diagram?
o: The number of medal winners who are also girls is 27.
The number of gymnasts who are also medal winners is 34.
The number of girls who are also gymnasts is 41.
The number of girls who are neither gymnasts nor medal winners is 23.

a - upper epidermis, b - lower epidermis, c - guard cell, d - air spaces, e - chloroplast
